statement.markdown: Implement a function `inorderHeapify` that takes an array of integers as input and performs an in-place inorder heapify.
statement.notes: Time complexity should be O(n), where n is the size of the input array.

hints.text: Consider the properties of a max heap and how to maintain them while performing an in-order heapify.

editorial.title: Inorder Heapify Explanation
editorial.intuition: Perform inorder heapify by iterating through the array and ensuring each element is greater than its children.
editorial.bruteForce: Time complexity of O(n log n) due to repeated comparisons.
editorial.optimalSolution: Time complexity of O(n) using a recursive approach or by using a loop to ensure heap property.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: After inorder heapify, array will satisfy the max-heap property.
